scripts.test:storycluster:quality: pnpm --filter @vh/storycluster-engine exec vitest run src/vectorBackend.test.ts src/server.test.ts src/stageRunner.pipeline.test.ts src/coherenceAudit.test.ts src/storyclusterQualityGate.test.ts --config ./vitest.config.ts --reporter=verbose
scripts.test:storycluster:correctness: pnpm --filter @vh/storycluster-engine exec vitest run src/benchmarkCorpusKnownEventOngoingFixtures.test.ts src/storyclusterKnownEventOngoingReplay.test.ts src/storyclusterQualityGate.test.ts --config ./vitest.config.ts --reporter=verbose && pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:live:daemon-feed:build && pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:live:daemon-feed:semantic-gate
scripts.test:mesh:browser-canary: VITE_GUN_PEERS='["http://127.0.0.1:7788/gun","http://127.0.0.1:7789/gun","http://127.0.0.1:7790/gun"]' VITE_GUN_PEER_MINIMUM=3 VITE_GUN_PEER_QUORUM_REQUIRED=2 VITE_VH_ALLOW_LOCAL_MESH_PEERS=true VITE_VH_GUN_LOCAL_STORAGE=false VITE_VH_SHOW_HEALTH=true pnpm --filter @vh/web-pwa build && pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:mesh:browser-canary
scripts.check:storycluster:production-readiness: pnpm check:storycluster:correctness && pnpm check:news-sources:health && VH_STORYCLUSTER_PRODUCTION_READINESS_ENFORCE=true pnpm report:storycluster:production-readiness
scripts.automation:test:storycluster:publisher-c: env ANALYSIS_RELAY_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VITE_ANALYSIS_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_STORYCLUSTER_TEXT_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_DAEMON_FEED_IN_PROCESS_STORYCLUSTER=true VH_DAEMON_FEED_REQUIRE_SHARED_STACK=true sh -c 'VH_NEWS_SOURCE_ADMISSION_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS=${VH_NEWS_SOURCE_ADMISSION_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS:-2000} pnpm report:news-sources:health && pnpm test:storycluster:publisher-canary'
scripts.automation:test:storycluster:consumer-sm: env ANALYSIS_RELAY_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VITE_ANALYSIS_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_STORYCLUSTER_TEXT_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_DAEMON_FEED_REQUIRE_SHARED_STACK=true VH_DAEMON_FEED_CONSUMER_SMOKE_HTTP_ONLY=true VH_DAEMON_FEED_CONSUMER_SMOKE_STATIC_ONLY=true sh -c 'pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:live:daemon-feed:build && pnpm test:storycluster:consumer-smoke'
scripts.automation:test:storycluster:retained-up: env ANALYSIS_RELAY_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VITE_ANALYSIS_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_STORYCLUSTER_TEXT_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_STORYCLUSTER_AUDIT_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini VH_STORYCLUSTER_OPENAI_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 VH_DAEMON_FEED_SOAK_RUNS=1 VH_DAEMON_FEED_SOAK_SAMPLE_COUNT=1 VH_DAEMON_FEED_MAX_ITEMS_PER_SOURCE=2 VH_DAEMON_FEED_MAX_ITEMS_TOTAL=15 VH_DAEMON_FEED_REQUIRE_SHARED_RELAY=true VH_DAEMON_FEED_REQUIRE_SHARED_STORYCLUSTER=true sh -c 'pnpm automation:ensure-stack && pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:live:daemon-feed:build && pnpm --filter @vh/e2e test:live:daemon-feed:semantic-soak'
